# Josh Coolman's Design Sandbox

> A Next.js sandbox for design experiments, blog posts, and documentation on building with AI agents.

This is a personal design lab where Josh Coolman explores visual design, typography, layout systems, and agentic AI workflows. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and CSS Modules. Each experiment is self-contained. The blog covers the experience of designing and building software collaboratively with AI agents.

Source: https://github.com/joshcoolman-smc/sandbox

## Design Experiments

- [Retro Bento](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/retro-bento): CrossFit Bento meets Retro Tech -- nine fictional hardware modules with LCD displays, animated gauges, interactive knobs, and LED matrix
- [Retro Tech Control Panel](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/retro-tech): Hardware-inspired CSS control panel with knobs, faders, toggles, and LED meters
- [CrossFit Bento](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/crossfit-bento): Dark bento grid dashboard for CrossFit training data with charts and heatmaps
- [Sticky Notes](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/sticky-notes): Interactive sticky note stack with swipe animation and handwriting font
- [Contact Sheet](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/contact-sheet): Client-side image folder browser for building file lists to share with LLMs
- [Font Pairings](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/font-pairings): 40 curated Google Font pairings with copy-to-clipboard LLM prompts
- [Modular Grid](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/modular-grid): Swiss-inspired modular grid system with toggleable overlay and type specimen
- [Day at a Glance](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/day-at-a-glance): Time-aware workday timeline with dynamic now-line tracking
- [CrossFit Design Challenge](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/crossfit-challenge): Four AI personas designed CrossFit homepages with dark mode, animation, and data viz
- [Terminator - Text Scramble](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/terminator): Terminal-style text scramble effect with two-phase animation
- [Brand Guidelines](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/color-spec): Interactive brand guidelines with live color and typography customization
- [Blend](https://www.joshcoolman.com/design-experiments/blend): Swiss modernist gradient specimen with organic mesh gradients via SVG blur

## Blog

- [Design as Dialogue](https://www.joshcoolman.com/blog/design-as-dialogue): You can't spec your way to good design
- [Memoirs of an Agent](https://www.joshcoolman.com/blog/memoirs-of-an-agent): Claude Code writes a blog post about working with Josh
- [Just Say What You Want](https://www.joshcoolman.com/blog/just-say-what-you-want): The shift from writing code to talking about it
- [It's Happening](https://www.joshcoolman.com/blog/its-happening): Dispatches from the moment everything shifted
- [Your Basic Blog](https://www.joshcoolman.com/blog/your-basic-blog): How this blog works and why it's just markdown files in a repo
- [You're Doing It Wrong](https://www.joshcoolman.com/blog/youre-doing-it-wrong): Why AI-powered design tools are just the old paradigm with new paint
- [Never Google Yourself](https://www.joshcoolman.com/blog/never-google-yourself): Practical SEO for people like me

## Docs

- [Overview](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/overview): Project overview and purpose
- [Progress](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/progress): Development progress and milestones
- [Component Architecture](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/features/component-architecture): Component extraction and architecture patterns
- [Skills](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/features/skills): Claude Code skill system documentation
- [Sticky Notes](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/features/sticky-notes): Sticky notes component documentation
- [TypeScript Migration](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/features/typescript-migration): TypeScript migration guide
- [AI Dev Stack](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/stack/ai-dev-stack): AI development stack overview
- [BYOK Pattern](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/stack/byok-pattern): Bring Your Own Keys pattern
- [Stack Overview](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/stack/stack-overview): Full technology stack reference
- [Design Test Page Prompt](https://www.joshcoolman.com/docs/prompts/design-test-page): Prompt template for design experiments
